name: GE HealthCare Technologies
analysis: GEHC has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 26% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry $66.0600, stop $60.1227, target $73.4693 (1.25:1) — then trail it.
